brief: Build a premium AI-native workspace landing experience from an approved cinematic creative reference, preserving visual direction through implementation and proof.
method: manual head-to-head review using the same brief, same scoring rubric, and saved artifacts or screenshots for every competitor

evidence: creative reference, asset kit, design DNA, implementation plan, taste validation, and proof bundle are first-class artifacts
provider mechanics remain hidden behind mission receipts and proof
strong component generation and framework realism
weaker preservation of approved cinematic art direction without a separate design DNA artifact
less explicit proof around visual fidelity, staged approvals, and cost-aware lane routing
weaker creative-direction preservation and proof bundle semantics on the same brief

honesty_constraints: Scores are not a live SaaS benchmark unless competitor artifacts are regenerated and attached for the current date.
Claims must say this benchmark is a same-brief artifact review, not a universal product ranking.
A win requires preserved taste plus shippable implementation proof, not layout aesthetics alone.
